ddls:
CREATE TABLE "product_weights" (
  "gst_id_no" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weight record */,
  "weight" REAL /* Total weight of the products collected */,
  "gst_cereal" INTEGER /* Weight of cereal products */,
  "gst_other" INTEGER /* Weight of other agricultural products */,
  "gst_total" INTEGER /* Total weight calculated as the sum of cereal and other products */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the products were collected */,
  "farm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the farm where the products were collected */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the farm is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gst_id_no"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_weights_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_weights_farm_id FOREIGN KEY ("farm_id") REFERENCES farms ("farm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cereal_types" (
  "cereal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cereal type */,
  "cereal_name" TEXT /* Name of the cereal type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cereal type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the cereal type (e.g., wheat, corn, rice) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cereal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "other_products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the agricultural product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the agricultural product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., oilseed, fiber) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "harvest_records" (
  "harvest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each harvest record */,
  "gst_id_no" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated product weight record */,
  "harvest_date" TEXT /* Date when the harvest was collected */,
  "farm_location" TEXT /* Location of the farm where the harvest took place */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the harvest */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("harvest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_harvest_records_gst_id_no FOREIGN KEY ("gst_id_no") REFERENCES product_weights ("gst_id_no")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., farm manager, inspector, coordinator) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., production, logistics, management) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "gst_id_no" INTEGER /* ID of the product weight record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "action_performed" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., updated, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_gst_id_no FOREIGN KEY ("gst_id_no") REFERENCES product_weights ("gst_id_no")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "climate" TEXT /* Climate of the region (e.g., tropical, temperate) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logistics" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each logistics record */,
  "gst_id_no" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated product weight record */,
  "transport_method" TEXT /* Method of transportation used for delivery */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Date of product delivery */,
  "destination" TEXT /* Destination of the shipment */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Carrier responsible for the shipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logistics_gst_id_no FOREIGN KEY ("gst_id_no") REFERENCES product_weights ("gst_id_no")
)

CREATE TABLE "farms" (
  "farm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each farm */,
  "farm_name" TEXT /* Name of the farm */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the farm */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the farm is located */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the farm owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("farm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_cereals" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "cereal_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cereal type */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the cereal in the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id", "cereal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_other_products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "other_product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the other product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the other product in the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id", "other_product_id")
)
